query:
SELECT id, name, tagline, dateLabel, createdAt FROM startup_of_day WHERE name LIKE '%Hebbia%' OR name LIKE '%hebbia%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT id, name, tagline, dateLabel, createdAt FROM startup_of_day ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT id, name, tagline, dateLabel, createdAt FROM startup_of_day WHERE name LIKE '%Hebbia%' OR name LIKE '%hebbia%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT id, name, tagline, dateLabel, createdAt FROM startup_of_day ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
